source: Colab batch=512, dualbranch v3: pipeline overhaul (scaling + remove VP structure features)
changes_from_v2: Removed 8 VP structure features (let spatial attention learn shape from raw bins)
Added walk-forward-safe z-score for volume_ratio, log_return, bar_range, bar_body
Soft tanh squashing for outliers (preserves magnitude, bounds gradients)
verdict: Mixed. Bull long EV improved significantly (+0.47% vs v1) — spatial attention IS learning shape from raw bins. But bear short EV collapsed (-0.64% vs v1) — handcrafted VP features may have been doing real work for the bear side. Next: add VP structure features back, keep scaling fixes.
